# omada_saml_role (Resource)

Manages a SAML role (external user group) on the Omada Controller. Maps a SAML usergroup_name attribute to a controller role with site access.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the external user group. Must match the SAML usergroup_name attribute value exactly (case-sensitive).
- `role_id` (String) The controller role to assign. Valid values: super_admin_id, admin_id, viewer_id.
- `site_ids` (List of String) List of site IDs this role has access to.

### Optional

- `end_time` (Number) End time of the temporary validity period (Unix milliseconds). Defaults to 0.
- `start_time` (Number) Start time of the temporary validity period (Unix milliseconds). Defaults to 0.
- `temporary_enable` (Boolean) Whether this role has a temporary validity period. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SAML role.
- `role_name` (String) The human-readable name of the assigned role (computed).
